title: safety.viz delta-delta data contract
description: Long-format results data: one record per measurement at a visit (SDD-DATA-001). Column names are supplied by the settings mapping; each participant needs at least a baseline and a comparison visit for the two selected measures so change-from-baseline can be computed. The renderer removes missing/non-numeric results with a reported count (SDD-REG-008) and plots one point per participant (change in measure X vs change in measure Y).

data.description: d3.csv()-style records; every row carries the measure, result, participant, and visit columns named in settings.

settings.description: Column mappings and rendering options; merged onto the module's DEFAULT_SETTINGS, so only overrides need to be supplied.

measure_col.description: Column holding the measure name; required in data (SDD-CFG-004).

value_col.description: Column holding the numeric result; required in data. Non-numeric results are removed with a logged count (SDD-CFG-005, SDD-REG-008).

id_col.description: Participant identifier column; one plotted point per participant (SDD-CFG-006).

visit_col.description: Categorical visit column; drives the baseline/comparison visit selectors (SDD-CFG-007).

visitn_col.description: Optional numeric visit column; orders the visit selectors and the sparkline (SDD-CFG-008).

measure_x.description: Measure plotted on the x-axis; defaults to the first measure in the data (SDD-CFG-009, SDD-CFG-010).

measure_y.description: Measure plotted on the y-axis; defaults to the second measure in the data (SDD-CFG-011).

baseline_visits.description: Baseline visit(s); multiple visits are averaged. Defaults to the first visit (SDD-CFG-012).

comparison_visits.description: Comparison visit(s); multiple visits are averaged. Defaults to the last visit (SDD-CFG-013).

add_regression_line.description: Draw a simple linear regression line with an equation and R² note (SDD-REG-026).

filters.description: Optional filter columns rendered as controls (SDD-CFG-014).

details.description: Optional participant-detail columns shown above the linked measure table; defaults derive from id_col and the filters (SDD-CFG-015).
